name: US NUCLEAR CORP.
summary: Corporate History US Nuclear Corp f/k/a APEX 3 Inc., was incorporated in the State of Delaware on February 14, 2012, and has since amended its name to US Nuclear Corp., (US Nuclear) on May 4, 2012 with the State of Delaware.
